identity.name: Julius
identity.tagline: Founder of Leaf Studios. I build high performance Minecraft plugins from economy systems to custom game engines. Java, Spigot, Paper, Folia.

about.comment: Passionate about writing clean, performant Java. Every plugin ships with proper config, full docs and real support.

mainProject.title: Leaf Studios
mainProject.label: leaf_studios | main project
mainProject.description: Premium plugin development studio. Every plugin ships with modern GUI systems, deep config, PlaceholderAPI support, and active maintenance. Used across 100+ servers worldwide.

commissions.intro: I also build commissioned plugins, server setups, and websites. Click through to see client work, servers I helped build, and project case studies.

items.title: Commission Plugins
items.desc: Private and public plugins built for creators, minigames, and network systems.

items.title: Servers Worked On
items.desc: Setup, balancing, optimization, and long term maintenance for live servers.

items.title: Web Projects
items.desc: Websites, docs portals, and frontend work supporting plugin or server brands.

contact.intro: Need a custom plugin? Custom server setup? Let's talk. Hit me on Discord for the fastest reply, or check out the store on BuiltByBit.
